The [[Ulig Abaha Ltd.]] '''#2 Warpod''', or '''warpod pinnace''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. They were also used by the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]] before their defeat in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Characteristics==
The 20-meter long Warpod was crewed by a pilot and four gunners who operated the two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets and the bottom-mounted [[Cutting torch/Legends|cutting torch]]. It was capable of going toe-to-toe with older designs from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but newer designs like the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] or [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] were vastly superior to the #2 Warpod.

==History==
Pirates in or around the Corporate Sector sometimes used Warpods. [[Magg]] used #2 Warpods against [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] over [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Pirates & Privateers'' shows a silhouette of a Warpod which does not resemble the illustration from the ''Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook''.
